case_title: MCCORMICK, JOHN M. REV. et al VS GLOWACKI, MARGARET

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY MCCORMICK, JOHN M. REV. NEW THOUGHT RELIGIOUS SCIENCE AS TO DEFENDANT GLOWACKI, MARGARET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCORMICK, JOHN M. REV. NEW THOUGHT RELIGIOUS SCIENCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GLOWACKI, MARGARET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO MARGARET GLOWACKI RETURNED SIGNED
